task_completion.description: Page 1 includes the title 'Electrical Circuits', the terms 'series' and 'parallel', and an 'Essential Question'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main canvas or the page thumbnail for Page 1 in ActivInspire. Verify there are text boxes containing the title 'Electrical Circuits', the words 'series' and 'parallel', and an 'Essential Question'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 is titled 'Series Circuit' and contains a labeled diagram of a series circuit with at least 5 shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Page 2 in the main canvas or thumbnail. Verify the title 'Series Circuit' is present. Check for a single-loop circuit diagram containing at least 5 distinct shapes/objects representing and labeled as a battery, bulb (or resistor), and switch.

task_completion.description: Page 3 is titled 'Parallel Circuit' and contains a labeled diagram of a parallel circuit with at least two branches and at least 6 shapes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Page 3 in the main canvas or thumbnail. Verify the title 'Parallel Circuit' is present. Check for a multi-loop circuit diagram (at least two branches) containing at least 6 distinct shapes/objects representing and labeled as a battery, bulb/resistor, and switch.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains a text note mentioning 'branches' or 'paths'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the text on Page 3 and verify there is a specific note or sentence that includes the word 'branches' or 'paths'.
Look at the Page Browser / thumbnails panel on the left side of the ActivInspire window. Verify there are exactly 3 page thumbnails, no more and no less.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved as 'circuit_diagram_lesson.flipchart' in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog box showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' and the filename 'circuit_diagram_lesson.flipchart', or check the ActivInspire title bar for the updated filename, or a file manager window showing the saved file.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the lesson.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively using the ActivInspire toolbar, shape tools, and text tools, rather than running a script in the terminal to generate the file.

integrity.description: The diagrams are constructed using shapes and tools within the application, not just pasted images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of individual shapes, lines, and text boxes being placed and manipulated on the canvas, rather than a single static image pasted from a web browser.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'File -> Save' or 'Save As' dialog box being opened and interacted with in ActivInspire.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The flipchart must have exactly 3 pages. The text across the flipchart must include the terms 'Circuit', 'Series', 'Parallel', 'Battery', 'Switch', and at least one of ('Bulb', 'Resistor', 'Lamp', 'Light'). Page 2 (Series Circuit) must contain a minimum of 5 shapes. Page 3 (Parallel Circuit) must contain a minimum of 6 shapes. The expected save path is '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/circuit_diagram_lesson.flipchart'.
